boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: public statement approval.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Dependency remains open per control record
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current communications/legal approval and final text match remain open

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record does not close the exact boundary, and policy requires current source records to close it before execution. The communication boundary and policy both confirm the dependency remains open, so the correct disposition is ESCALATE until legal approval and final text match are explicitly closed.
open_blockers: current communications/legal approval and final text match
